rationale: The citing paper uses Van Heerde, Dekimpe, and Putsis (2005) in a specific methodological role, not as a generic background citation. In the managerial application section, the authors explicitly note their reduced-form model is subject to the Lucas critique and state they followed the 2005 paper's suggestions by restricting analysis to short-term predictions with policies close to historically observed ones. This citation directly shapes how they justify and bound their policy simulation claims.
relation_description: The citing paper applies guidance from the cited Lucas-critique paper to constrain interpretation of its reduced-form model outputs. Specifically, it adopts the recommendation to focus on short-term, historically similar policy scenarios when presenting managerial predictions.
